title: Lepanthes blepharophylla
taxonomy: Lepanthes blepharophylla is a species of orchid in the genus Lepanthes. It is classified as a member of the Orchidaceae family. Lepanthes blepharophylla is further categorized as a type of epiphytic orchid. The specific classification of Lepanthes blepharophylla can be broken down into the kingdom Plantae, class Liliopsida, order Asparagales, family Orchidaceae, genus Lepanthes, and species L. blepharophylla. This complex classification system helps to identify and understand the relationships between different species within the plant kingdom.

The health benefits of Lepanthes blepharophylla include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments such as fever, respiratory issues, and skin conditions.
